Dialog.name: MSG_133_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1093 0 0}I think I'm just going to go out and find something to eat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry... I'm not in much of a cooking mood today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_134_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari seems upset...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should work to repair our relationship[n]first, then maybe we could cook together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_135_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}I was going to watch this DVD I borrowed, but I don't think I'm up for it today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe some other time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_136_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari seems upset...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe if I worked to repair our relationship[n]first, we could watch a DVD together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}One of my classmates lent me a DVD of this show she's been watching.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've been curious about it for a while, and apparently it's gotten some pretty good ratings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I could use a break, so I was thinking about sitting down and giving it a watch.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0616_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}One of the girls in my class let me borrow a DVD of this show she's been watching.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was thinking about watching it in my room, but it might be better to watch it out here since the TV is bigger.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching this DVD with Yukari might[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, what's up, {f 4 1}-kun? Did you wanna watch with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}I haven't been able to stop thinking about how that show ended last time, so I borrowed the next DVD.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching the show with Yukari might[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, how about it, {f 4 1}-kun? You up to watch more of this zombie show with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1002 0 0}This is it. I borrowed the last volume of the series you and I have been watching.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's been a wild ride, and while I'm sad the story's ending, I can't wait to watch how they wrap things up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari is really looking forward to this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching with her might help[n]improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, {f 4 1}-kun? You ready for the finale?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1066 0 0}I borrowed a DVD of another show. I hear this one's supposed to be kinda scary, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Yukari will gain any more[n]new skills even if I watch a DVD with her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But watching this show with her might[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}How about it? Wanna watch with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}Gotcha. Talk to me if you change your mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1098 0 0}Hey, what's up? Ooh, are you actually interested in watching that DVD?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching the show with Yukari might[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll go ahead and get it set up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1098 0 0}Hey there. Did you still want to watch that show?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Yukari will gain any more[n]new skills even if I watch a DVD with her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But watching this show with her might[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll go ahead and get it set up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching the show with Yukari might[n]help improve my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll go ahead and get it set up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}I got enthusiastic about cooking for myself for once... but I bought way too many ingredients.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I am gonna have a lot of leftovers on my hands...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0731_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Since we're getting closer to the day of our mission, I wanted to cook something healthy, but... I bought way too many ingredients.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I am gonna have a lot of leftovers on my hands...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_1002_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}The moon will be full in two days, so I figured I'd cook something hearty...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I kind of overestimated how much I would need and bought too many ingredients. Looks like I'll have a lot of leftovers...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_1023_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}The next battle is going to be our last, so I wanted to cook myself something healthy in preparation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I might have gone a little nuts and overstocked the fridge, though. I'm gonna have a lot of leftovers...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like Yukari wants[n]me to cook with her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Yukari?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun, will you help me out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}You know that sautéed chicken I messed up last time? I figured out what went wrong. This time, I'm gonna do it right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0731_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}You know that sautéed chicken I messed up last time? I figured out what went wrong. This time, I'm gonna do it right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Plus, the next full moon's less than a week away... We deserve to eat something hearty, don't we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_1002_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}You know that sautéed chicken I messed up last time? I figured out what went wrong. This time, I'm gonna do it right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Also, it's almost a full moon, and I could use a task to distract myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_1023_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm thinking about trying my hand at that chicken sauté I messed up last time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}And maybe cooking will help me de-stress a little about our final battle coming up. I could use a sous-chef, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sounds like Yukari wants to cook together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Wanna help? Come on, anyone can do it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1067 0 0}Hey, {f 4 1}-kun. Did you eat dinner already?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm thinking about making some food...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0731_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was just about to get some dinner ready.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}The full moon's less than a week away, so I thought I'd make something a little healthier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_1002_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}Hey, did you already eat dinner?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was just about to start cooking...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Our mission is coming up, so we gotta make sure to eat well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_1023_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1078 0 0}Hey, did you already eat dinner, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was just about to get started in the kitchen...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}The next mission is gonna be our last. Eating something healthy seems appropriate, all things considered.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari is all fired up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with her?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you've got time on your hands, do you want to make some food together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}I'm thinking about putting some food together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}If you've got some time on your hands, do you want to cook with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0731_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Since our operation is coming up, I'm trying to think of something healthy to make.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Did you wanna cook together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_1002_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}I was thinking about getting to work in the kitchen to take my mind off of things.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}If you've got some time, we should cook together. What do you say?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_1023_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1078 0 0}The next battle will be our last... I gotta start preparing myself. Admittedly, I'm pretty nervous.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}As much as I want some comfort food, I should probably make something healthy. Wanna give me a hand with food prep?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Yukari will gain any[n]more new skills even if I cook with her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}How about it? Sous-chef gets the leftovers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1039 0 0}Awesome. Let's go make something tasty.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}All right. I'll be here if you change your mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1104 0 0}Oh, hey. Did you want to make something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_038_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Yukari?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'd love it if you could lend me a hand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1104 0 0}Hey there. Did you want to spend some time in the kitchen?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Yukari will gain any[n]more new skills even if I cook with her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you wanted to help out, I'd really appreciate it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Yukari?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you wanted to help out, I'd really appreciate it.[n]{f 1 1}
